channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Dingwall NG3 5-String Darkglass 10th Anniversary Limited Edition (2019) – Near Mint – Professionally Set Up – Upgraded — $3,072.62
item.description:
$3,072.62 · Excellent · Fuzz Market

⚠️ Shipping notice: Please contact me before purchasing sharing your full address to receive an accurate shipping quote. Shipping costs will be calculated based on your location and added to the final price.

Selling my 2019 Dingwall NG3 5-String Darkglass 10th Anniversary Limited Edition, one of the most desirable NG models ever produced.

This limited edition was produced in just over 200 instruments worldwide and celebrates the 10th anniversary of Darkglass Electronics.

Serial Number: 04978

I originally purchased this bass for a musical project that unfortunately never happened, so it has seen very little use. It has never been gigged and has only been played occasionally at home. It has always been stored with great care and is in near mint condition.

Before listing it for sale, the bass was professionally inspected and set up by my luthier. The electronics were checked, the instrument received a complete professional setup, and it has been fitted with a brand-new set of Dingwall stainless steel strings, making it ready to play straight out of the case.

Why this edition is special

The Darkglass 10th Anniversary Edition is much more than a different finish.

  • Limited production of just over 200 basses worldwide
  • First NG series model to feature a Carbon Fiber Reinforced Neck with Dual Action Truss Rod
  • Exclusive anodized aluminum pickguard with engraved Darkglass logo
  • Beautiful exclusive deep metallic silver finish

The finish on this bass is absolutely stunning. The depth of the metallic silver is difficult to capture in photographs and looks even better in person.

Premium Upgrades

The bass has been upgraded with premium components to improve balance and performance:

  • Hipshot Ultralite Black tuning machines
  • Nova Guitar Parts Dingwall Bass Bridge Retrofit (Black)

Both upgrades are completely reversible and significantly reduce weight while improving tuning stability.

Specifications

  • 2019 Darkglass 10th Anniversary Limited Edition
  • 5-string multiscale design
  • Carbon Fiber Reinforced Neck
  • Dual Action Truss Rod
  • Dingwall FD-3N pickups
  • Darkglass Tone Capsule preamp
  • Outstanding low-B definition
  • Exceptional balance and playability

Condition

  • Near Mint condition
  • Never used for live performances
  • Home use only
  • Fully functional
  • Professionally set up before sale
  • Brand-new Dingwall stainless steel strings

Included

  • Original Dingwall gig bag
  • Original Dingwall shipping box
  • Original adjustment tools

Shipping

The bass will be packed in its original Dingwall packaging and shipped fully insured with great care.

Local pickup is also welcome.

Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions or would like additional photos.

item.title: Ibanez Bass Guitar ASB140 — $349
item.description:
$349 · Good · GC Pawn

Ibanez ASB140
Item: Bass Guitar
Size: 48.5"

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass, Maple Fingerboard, Aquatone Blue — $892.66
item.description:
$892.66 · Brand New · Niccolai Grandi Magazzini della Musica

Step onto the stage and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass®—a stage-ready bass with modern upgrades to enhance your performance and inspire your playing.


The Player II Precision Bass exudes Fender's timeless appeal, but underneath it's ready for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast, smooth playability, from the Modern "C" profile with satin urethane finish on the back to the comfortable 9.5"-radius rosewood or maple fingerboard with rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. The classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and new colors from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups deliver bright highs, musical mids, and deep lows that enhance any playing style. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles, and open-back tuning machines ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.


Perfect for creating your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the look, sound, and feel that only a Fender can deliver.


Features


Ergonomically Shaped Alder Body


Modern "C" Neck Profile


9.5"-radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard (24.13 cm) and Beveled Edges


Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups


Single-Bolt Steel 4-Saddle Barrel Bridge


Exposed Gear Tuning Machines


Series: Player II


Orientation: Right-Hand


Color: Aquatone Blue


Country of Origin: MX


Icon Specs


Neck


Headstock: Precision Bass®


Neck Material: Maple


Neck Finish: Satin Urethane Finish on Back, Gloss Urethane Finish on Front


Neck Shape: Modern "C"


Neck Construction: 4-Bolt Standard


FINGERBOARD RADIUS: 9.5" (241 mm)


FINGERBOARD MATERIAL: Maple


FREQUENCY MARKERS: Black Dot


SIDE MARKERS: Black


Number of Frets: 20


TRUSS ROD: Single Action, Head Adjust


TRUSS ROD NUT: 3/16" Hex Adjustment


NUT: Synthetic Bone


NUT WIDTH: 1.625" (41.3 mm)


NUT MATERIAL: Synthetic Bone


icon specs


Body


BODY: Alder


BODY FINISH: Gloss Polyester


BODY SHAPE: Precision Bass®


BODY STYLE: Solid Body


BODY MATERIAL: Alder


sku-image


icon specs


Hardware


BRIDGE: 4-Saddle Standard


BRIDGE MOUNT: 5-Screw Vintage-Style


PICKGUARD: 3-Ply Parchment


PICKUP COVERS: Black


CONTROL KNOBS: Knurled Flat-Top


HARDWARE FINISH: Nickel/Chrome


TUNING TOOLS: Standard Open-Gear


TREES STRING PRESSERVintage-Style Disc


STRINGSFender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406


HANDLE PLATE 4-Bolt with "F" Logo


BELT HOLDERStandard


icon specs


Electronics


CENTER PICKUPPlayer Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass®


PICKUP CONFIGURATIONSplit Single-Coil


CONTROLSMaster Volume, Master Tone


SWITCHINGNone


icon specs


Measurements


DIMENSIONS4.50x15.20x50.00 IN


SHIPPING WEIGHT12.40 LB


KEY SIZE Medium Jumbo


WIDTH MEASURES 34" (86.36 cm)


SHIPPING LENGTH50.00 IN


SHIPPING HEIGHT4.50 IN


SHIPPING WIDTH15.20 IN


icon specs


Accessories


RECOMMENDED CASEClassic Series Precision®/Jazz Bass® Wood Hardshell Case, P/N 0996166306 (Not Included)


ALLEN SADDLE HEIGHT.070" Hex (Allen) Wrench


TRUSS ROD WRENCH3/16" Hex (Allen)


RECOMMENDED GIG BAGFB1225 Electric Bass Gig Bag, P/N 0991622406 (Not Included)


icon specs


Various


STILE2 Single-Coil

item.title: 2009 ESP LTD B-1006 Deluxe 6 String Active Bass Guitar with Gig bag — $756.18
item.description:
$756.18 · Excellent · Musical Money Ltd

In near mint condition, this bass shows just one tiny scuff to the top corner of the head, otherwise, it is mint throughout.  The playability is excellent thanks to a low action. Electrics are all original and operating exactly as they should. There is no fret wear and the neck is in great shape with no warping or bends.

The bass is supplied with a good quality padded Rock Bag gig bag.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop '70s Jazz Bass NOS 2013 — $3,993.02
item.description:
$3,993.02 · Excellent · Bass & Tone

Here is my Fender 70s custom shop bass. This one is from 2012 and includes un opened accessories and certificates! It’s excellent condition with very minor dents not noticeable far away.

Ideally looking for sale but would trade! Show me what you got! Looking for a Ken smith Hadrien Feraud / Mayones HF or others around the same value.

Any questions please ask and you’re welcome to come test the bass before committing!

Sensible offers welcome

Can deliver reasonable distance

Thanks!

item.title: Ibanez GSRM20-BK Gio miKro Soundgear - Black — $197.99
item.description:
$197.99 · B-Stock · GuitarSloth

Ibanez miKro GSRM20 Short-Scale Electric Bass Guitar

The Ibanez miKro GSRM20 delivers big bass tone in a compact, easy-to-play package—perfect for beginners, younger players, or anyone who prefers a shorter scale. Its poplar body and slim neck provide excellent comfort, while the 28.6" short scale makes every note easy to reach without sacrificing tone.

Equipped with Dynamix P/J pickups, this bass offers classic, punchy tones suitable for a wide range of styles—from rock and pop to funk and R&B. The B10 fixed bridge adds solid sustain and reliable tuning stability, making it a great choice for practice, recording, or smaller gigs.

B-Stock Disclosure:
This instrument is being sold as B-Stock and may show minor cosmetic imperfections such as light finish blemishes or handling marks. These are purely visual and do not affect playability or performance.

Features:

  • Model: Ibanez miKro GSRM20
  • Poplar body with slim, comfortable neck
  • 28.6" short scale length
  • Dynamix P/J pickups for versatile tone
  • B10 fixed bridge for solid sustain

Perfect for players looking for full bass tone in a compact, comfortable design.

Available at CA House Music — check out more gear at cahousemusic.com

This item is a "B-Stock Guitar" directly from the manufacturer. It is NEW Stock that has never been owned. Pictures are of the actual guitar you will receive.

we will have our licensed tech go over the guitar and set it up for you. On this guitar Ibanez states it is B-Stock due to finish flaws on side. (see pictures) that's not to say its the only defect that causes it to be a b-stock but the one Ibanez identified.

item.title: Sawtooth Trans Black Rudy Sarzo Fretted — $650
item.description:
$650 · Excellent · ChiDaddy365

Transparent Black, flamed maple binding. Fishman electronics. No case/bag so local pickup only.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass 2025 - Natural — $480.70
item.description:
$480.70 · Excellent · Rose Morris

Near mint example of a vintage style Jazz. This bass is less than a year old and has very little signs of use with only a couple of scratches and dings.

In true 70s style it's on the weighty side but plays and sounds great!

item.title: Ibanez Gio B150 2007 - Candy Apple Red Bass Guitar W/TKL Bag — $199.99
item.description:
$199.99 · Very Good · Richard Butler Guitars

The Ibanez GIO B150 Bass Guitar in Candy Apple Red is a high-quality electric bass guitar designed for right-handed players. With a solid body and 4-string configuration, this guitar delivers excellent tones and performance. The vibrant red color adds a touch of style to the overall design, making it a stand-out instrument for any musician looking for a reliable and visually appealing bass guitar. The included bag also ensures easy transportation and protection for gigs or studio sessions. Bass plays and sounds as great as it looks. It has the usual finish imperfections associated with use. As is.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass 2019 - Present - Natural — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Jordan's Gear Garage

Selling a Squier Classic vibe jazz bass in 70s natural. Very good condition with a few minor scuffs that are hard to see in photos

item.title: 1971 Fender Precision Bass, sunburst w/HSC — $7,414.63
item.description:
$7,414.63 · Excellent · Seventiesguitars

Stunning 1971 Fender Precision Bass in beautiful sunburst finish with rosewood neck and newer Fender hardcase. S/N reads 313xxx. The bass is in all original and excellent condition. Only a very few signs of age and wear as you would expect from a 55+ year old instrument. Very nice tortoise shell pickguard. All electronics are original and all solder joints are untouched. The neck has more of a fat C-profile and is also great to play with smaller hands. It's straight, the truss rod works perfectly and its nut still sits flush with the neck heel like it was new. The frets show hardly any wear, it seems as if the bass has been played with flatwound strings for most of its life. Even the original chrome covers are present. The weight is a comfortable 4,2 kg. It plays and sounds fantastic. If you have any questions feel free to ask.

Important notes: All used instruments should be assumed to have some degree of wear. No instrument is perfect for everyone! I have described the item to the best of my ability. However with all preowned instruments the condition is subjective! International Buyers: Shipping costs are calculated as Standard which means that in particular overseas shipping may take longer as it may be transported by sea. If you would like faster delivery, please ask before purchasing. Any additional fees including duties, VAT or any other charges related to international shipping are the responsibility of the purchaser and are non-refundable! All shipping and related costs are at the expense of the buyer.

item.title: Fender USA 1996 Deluxe P Bass Second Hand — $1,789.21
item.description:
$1,789.21 · Good · Rainbow Music

Fender USA 1996 Deluxe P Bass Second Hand.

The guitar is in very good condition with no major marks or play wear.

Supplied with a hard Bass guitar case ( not the original Fender one )

item.title: Ibanez SR1350B DUF Dual Mocha Burst Flat Premium Electric Bass — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Ibanez SR1350B DUF Dual Mocha Burst Flat Premium Electric Bass

The SR1350B DUF delivers a refined, ergonomic playing experience defined by its slimline neck profile and balanced body weight—core strengths of Ibanez's SR series design. The titanium-reinforced panga panga neck paired with a bound fingerboard and abalone inlays creates a premium feel that justifies its place in the Premium line. This 4-string excels in studio sessions and live work where articulate response and tonal flexibility are non-negotiable.

Playability & Build Quality

A titanium-reinforced Atlas neck in panga panga with a 24-fret bound fingerboard ensures long-term stability and consistent intonation across the 34" scale. The walnut top with panga panga strip over an African mahogany body combines visual distinction with tonal warmth, while the flat finish preserves the natural wood character. Premium fret edge treatment guarantees comfortable playability straight out of the case.

Tone & Electronics

Twin Nordstrand Big Single passive pickups deliver punchy, articulate response with impressive clarity across the frequency spectrum. The Ibanez custom 3-band active EQ with a 3-way mid frequency switch and EQ bypass enables precise tonal shaping—from warm, vintage character to modern attack—while the bypass switch with passive tone control on the treble pot preserves classic simplicity when needed.

Key Features
  • Double-cutaway African mahogany body with walnut and panga panga top
  • Titanium-reinforced panga panga neck with 24 medium frets
  • Bound panga panga fingerboard with abalone oval position markers
  • 34" (864mm) scale length tuned 1G, 2D, 3A, 4E
  • Pair of Nordstrand Big Single passive pickups
  • Ibanez custom 3-band EQ with 3-way mid frequency switch
  • EQ bypass switch with passive tone control on treble pot
  • MR5S Mono-rail bridge with adjustable 19mm string spacing (±1.5mm)
  • GraphTech Black TUSQ nut and Gotoh tuning machines
  • Black hardware throughout
  • Factory strung with D'Addario EXL165 strings (.045–.105)
  • Includes gig bag

This Premium Series instrument combines boutique-grade tonewoods, professional-grade electronics, and meticulous fret work to deliver a bass that performs reliably in demanding studio and live environments.

item.title: Warwick Alien 5-string Acoustic Bass - Left handed — $1,423.61
item.description:
$1,423.61 · Excellent · 2nd hand sales (personal)

Warwick Alien 5-string Acoustic Bass

Left-handed

Color/ Finish: Natural transparent satin


Model #: 1375909000CFOVSMWW L

User manual


----------

The guitar looks and functions very well.

Only 1 dent (surface-level, 0.8 mm in length) exists on top surface.

Otherwise, it is close to new.


The guitar is only used at home studio for recording purposes.

item.title: Yamaha BB-VIs Short Scale Bass 1982/1983 - Sunburst — $591.98
item.description:
$591.98 · Good · Soft Noise Audio

We are SOFT NOISE AUDIO, a vintage and second hand guitar dealership based in Dublin Ireland.

We aim to supply a wide range of rare and interesting vintage/second hand guitars, basses, along with a huge range or new high end boutique effect pedals and other rare treasures that can be viewed On our website.


On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website we offer excellent hard to find second hand equipment at fair and reasonable prices.

We are self confessed gear nerds and as such our first aim is always to excite ourselves with the gear we bring in, believing that if we achieve that then our customers will be equally excited by our offerings.
We are tired of seeing the same items in every store we enter for as long as we can remember so we wanted to offer something different.

We get regular deliveries so we are always freshening up our inventory to keep things from getting stale.


New items will appear On our website multiple times a week!

We also are happy to chat so feel free to get in touch with any questions or to negotiate deals On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website.



Lovely Japanese made Yamaha short scale. In great shape for its years with very few marks.

________________________________________

BRAND: Yamaha

MODEL: BB-VIs

YEAR: 1982/1983

FINISH: Sunburst

COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Japan

MATERIALS: Alder Body, Maple Neck, Rosewood Fingerboard

SCALE: 32"

CASE/BAG: No

TREM: N/A

WEIGHT: 3.8kg

item.description:

We are tired of seeing the same items in every store we enter for as long as we can remember so we wanted to offer something different.

We get regular deliveries so we are always freshening up our inventory to keep things from getting stale.

item.title: Yamaha BB234 4-String Electric Bass Guitar | Black | PJ Pickups | Indonesia 2024 — $280
item.description:
$280 · Very Good · Music Go Round Toledo

Condition: Very Good


Estimated Year: 2024


Made in: Indonesia


Includes Case/Gig Bag: None


Only accessories specifically listed in the Includes Case/Gig Bag section or shown in the photos are included. No additional accessories, software, cables, power supplies, manuals, boxes, or other items are included unless pictured or stated.


Used Yamaha BB234 4-String Electric Bass Guitar | Black


The Yamaha BB234 continues the legendary BB series tradition by offering exceptional build quality, versatile PJ electronics, and outstanding playability at an affordable price. Whether you're a beginner looking for your first serious bass or an experienced player needing a dependable gigging instrument, the BB234 delivers the classic Yamaha feel and tone that has made the BB line a favorite for decades.


Its alder body is paired with a comfortable maple neck and rosewood fingerboard, while the split-coil Precision-style pickup and bridge single-coil Jazz-style pickup provide everything from warm vintage thump to articulate modern punch. Individual pickup volume controls and a master tone make blending sounds simple and intuitive.


This instrument has been fully tested and is ready for rehearsal, recording, or the stage.


Features


• Alder body

• Maple bolt-on neck

• Rosewood fingerboard

• 34" scale length

• 21 medium frets

• Split-coil Precision-style neck pickup

• Single-coil Jazz-style bridge pickup

• Two pickup volume controls

• Master tone control

• Vintage-style open gear tuners

• Top-loading four-saddle bridge

• Black finish

• Crafted in Indonesia

• Serial Number: IKH243638


Condition


This bass is in very good overall condition and functions exactly as it should. The neck is straight, the electronics operate quietly, and it plays comfortably across the fretboard.


Cosmetically, there are light scratches and minor signs of normal use throughout the instrument. There is one small finish chip on the edge of the body near the control knobs, which is shown clearly in the photos. Aside from this minor cosmetic blemish, the bass presents very well and is an excellent player.


Thanks for looking! Feel free to contact us with any questions.


Store Policies


• All used gear is tested when it comes in and again before shipping.

• Ships the next business day whenever possible.

• Ships to the Continental U.S. only.

• No trades on shipped items.

• Returns accepted within 48 hours of delivery. Buyer is responsible for return shipping and a 20% restocking fee.

• Please contact us with any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Kramer XKB10 Aluminum Neck Bass 1980/81 – Modified Body — $889.76
item.description:
$889.76 · Good · Fuzz Market

⚠️ Shipping notice: Please contact me before purchasing sharing your full address to receive an accurate shipping quote. Shipping costs will be calculated based on your location and added to the final price.

Up for sale is a vintage Kramer XKB10 bass from circa 1980/81, featuring its original aluminum neck—the defining element that made early Kramer instruments so unique.

These early Kramer aluminum necks are becoming increasingly hard to find and are highly regarded for their exceptional sustain, clarity, and tuning stability. Combined with the Ebonol fingerboard and maple inserts, this neck delivers the distinctive, piano-like attack that Kramer is known for.

I originally purchased this instrument with the intention of restoring it to its original Flying V shape or using the neck for a custom build. Due to downsizing my collection, I’ve decided to let it go.

⚠️ Condition & originality:

  • The body has been modified by a previous owner and is no longer in its original Flying V shape
  • The body shows visible cosmetic wear and signs of use consistent with its age (see photos)
  • The instrument is fully playable and structurally solid
  • There is visible wear on the rear of the neck (see photos), purely cosmetic—it does not affect stability or playability

The bass includes its original Kramer hard case, and it will be carefully packed for shipping.


Specifications:

  • Body: Likely maple
  • Neck: Aluminum with maple reinforcement
  • Fingerboard: Ebonol
  • Neck profile: C shape
  • Neck thickness:
    • 1st fret: 0.82"
    • 12th fret: 0.92"
  • Radius: 12"
  • Nut width: 1-9/16"
  • Pickup: Original humbucker
  • Controls: Volume & tone
  • Hardware: Bridge appears to be original; tuners may have been replaced (currently functioning perfectly)


This is a great opportunity to acquire a genuine early-’80s Kramer aluminum neck instrument at a fraction of the price of a fully original example—ideal for collectors, players looking for that unmistakable Kramer tone, or builders seeking a high-quality vintage foundation for a custom project.

item.title: Squier Jaguar Bass H 4-String Electric Bass | Charcoal Frost Metallic | Indonesia | 2023 2023 — $200
item.description:
$200 · Very Good · Music Go Round Toledo

Condition: Very Good


Estimated Year: 2023


Made in: Indonesia


Includes Case/Gig Bag: None


Only accessories specifically listed in the Includes Case/Gig Bag section or shown in the photos are included. No additional accessories, software, cables, power supplies, manuals, boxes, or other items are included unless pictured or stated.


Used Squier Jaguar Bass H 4-String Electric Bass | Charcoal Frost Metallic


Looking for a straightforward bass that delivers big tone without breaking the bank? This Squier Jaguar Bass H is a modern take on the offset classic, featuring a comfortable short-scale-inspired offset body shape, a fast maple neck with a laurel fingerboard, and a powerful ceramic humbucking pickup that delivers punchy lows and plenty of output for rock, punk, indie, worship, and beyond.


The simple control layout makes it easy to dial in your sound, while the lightweight body and comfortable neck make this an excellent choice for beginners, gigging musicians, or anyone looking for a reliable grab-and-go bass.


Features


• Charcoal Frost Metallic finish

• Offset Jaguar Bass body

• Single ceramic humbucking bass pickup

• Master Volume and Master Tone controls

• 4-saddle adjustable bridge

• Maple neck

• Laurel fingerboard with dot inlays

• Open-gear tuning machines

• Crafted in Indonesia

• Serial Number: IOSJ23016808


Condition


This bass is in very good overall condition and has been fully tested. It plays well with comfortable action and all electronics function properly.


Cosmetically, there are a few light scratches and minor handling marks consistent with normal use. There is one small finish blemish/light scratch on the front of the body (shown in the photos), but nothing that affects playability or structural integrity. Overall, it presents very nicely and is ready for its next owner.


Thanks for looking! Feel free to contact us with any questions.


Store Policies


• All used gear is tested when it comes in and again before shipping.

• Ships the next business day whenever possible.

• Ships to the Continental U.S. only.

• No trades on shipped items.

• Returns accepted within 48 hours of delivery. Buyer is responsible for return shipping and a 20% restocking fee.

• Please contact us with any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Schecter C-4 Plus Left Handed - Charcoal Burst — $584.10
item.description:
$584.10 · B-Stock · GuitarSloth

Schecter C-4 Plus Left-Handed 4-String Bass GuitarPremium Looks. Powerful Tone. Built to Perform.

The Schecter C-4 Plus Left-Handed Bass delivers professional features, outstanding playability, and powerful low-end performance in an instrument that's ready for the stage or studio. Featuring a lightweight basswood body topped with beautiful quilted maple, this bass combines eye-catching style with a balanced, resonant voice that works across virtually any genre.

The comfortable Thin "C" maple neck and smooth rosewood fingerboard make fast runs, intricate grooves, and extended playing sessions feel effortless. Whether you're laying down tight rock rhythms, driving metal riffs, or locking into a funk groove, the C-4 Plus is built to keep up.

Powerful Schecter Electronics

Equipped with a pair of Schecter Diamond Bass humbuckers, the C-4 Plus delivers thick lows, punchy mids, and articulate highs with impressive clarity. A master volume, blend control, and active 2-band EQ give you plenty of control to shape your sound, allowing everything from vintage warmth to aggressive modern punch.

Built for Reliability

A Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, Schecter Diamond Bass bridge, and quality hardware ensure excellent tuning stability, solid sustain, and dependable performance whether you're practicing at home or playing live.

Schecter C-4 Plus Left-Handed Features:

  • Left-handed design
  • Lightweight basswood body with stunning quilted maple top
  • Comfortable Thin "C" maple neck for fast, effortless playability
  • Smooth rosewood fingerboard with 24 Narrow X-Jumbo frets
  • 34" scale length
  • Schecter Diamond Bass humbuckers deliver powerful, articulate tone
  • Active 2-band EQ with master volume and blend controls
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut for enhanced tuning stability
  • Schecter Diamond Bass bridge for excellent sustain and intonation
  • Black chrome hardware for a sleek modern appearance

Visit us and find more great gear at CAHouseMusic.com

This item is a "B-Stock Guitar" directly from the manufacturer. It is NEW Stock that has never been owned by an individual. Pictures are of the actual guitar you will receive.

we will have our licensed tech go over the guitar and set it up for you. On this guitar Schecter noted body damage by bottom strap button (see pictures) that's not to say its the only defects that could have caused it to be a B-stock.

item.title: Fender Japan Heritage 70s Jazz Bass 2022 - Natural — $1,659.69
item.description:
$1,659.69 · Very Good · Soft Noise Audio

We are SOFT NOISE AUDIO, a vintage and second hand guitar dealership based in Dublin Ireland.

We aim to supply a wide range of rare and interesting vintage/second hand guitars, basses, along with a huge range or new high end boutique effect pedals and other rare treasures that can be viewed On our website.


On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website we offer excellent hard to find second hand equipment at fair and reasonable prices.

We are self confessed gear nerds and as such our first aim is always to excite ourselves with the gear we bring in, believing that if we achieve that then our customers will be equally excited by our offerings.
We are tired of seeing the same items in every store we enter for as long as we can remember so we wanted to offer something different.

We get regular deliveries so we are always freshening up our inventory to keep things from getting stale.


New items will appear On our website multiple times a week!

We also are happy to chat so feel free to get in touch with any questions or to negotiate deals On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website.


Beautiful Fender Japan Jazz from there premium Heritage Range. Immaculate condition. Superior to a huge amount of American Models.

________________________________________

BRAND: Fender

item.title: Rickenbacker 4001 1978 - Fireglo — $4,744.18
item.description:
$4,744.18 · Very Good · Soft Noise Audio

We are SOFT NOISE AUDIO, a vintage and second hand guitar dealership based in Dublin Ireland.

We aim to supply a wide range of rare and interesting vintage/second hand guitars, basses, along with a huge range or new high end boutique effect pedals and other rare treasures that can be viewed On our website.


On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website we offer excellent hard to find second hand equipment at fair and reasonable prices.

We are self confessed gear nerds and as such our first aim is always to excite ourselves with the gear we bring in, believing that if we achieve that then our customers will be equally excited by our offerings.
We are tired of seeing the same items in every store we enter for as long as we can remember so we wanted to offer something different.

We get regular deliveries so we are always freshening up our inventory to keep things from getting stale.


New items will appear On our website multiple times a week!

We also are happy to chat so feel free to get in touch with any questions or to negotiate deals On our SOFT NOISE AUDIO website.



Stunning old Rickenbacker. Includes the famous double-fold truss rod, reverse-wound tuners. In really excellent condition for it's age. Metal parts are surprisingly clean. All parts appear to be original. 

________________________________________

BRAND: Rickenbacker

MODEL: 4001

YEAR: 1978

FINISH: Fireglo

COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: USA

MATERIALS: Maple Body, 3 Piece Maple/Walnut/Maple (Neck-through body design), Bound Rosewood Fingerboard

SCALE: 33.25"

CASE/BAG: Non Original Hardcase

TREM: N/A

WEIGHT: 4.3kg

What you have here is essentially a brand new 50s classic Vibe, with a basic case, and all original box / shipping material, and owners manual. Shipping included in the price as I live remote

item.title: Hofner 500/1 Violin Bass 1964 Sunburst — $4,819.44
item.description:
$4,819.44 · Very Good · MotoMusic

1964 Hofner 500/1 Violin Bass – Sunburst – Original Vintage Example

Just in is this beautiful and highly original 1964 Hofner 500/1 Violin Bass in its classic Sunburst finish.

Few basses are as instantly recognisable as the Hofner 500/1. Famously associated with Paul McCartney and the British Invasion era, the Violin Bass remains one of the most iconic instruments ever produced. Lightweight, comfortable and effortlessly playable, it delivers the warm, woody and unmistakably distinctive tone that has made it a favourite of players and collectors alike for over sixty years.

This particular example is presented in remarkable original condition for its age. The bass retains its original electronics, with potentiometer codes dating to 1963, consistent with early 1964 production. The original hardware is in excellent condition, including the machine heads, control panel and tailpiece. The frets show very little wear and the instrument plays exceptionally well with a comfortable action throughout the neck.

The bass has clearly been well cared for throughout its life and remains structurally excellent, with no breaks, repairs or modifications. Cosmetically there are a handful of minor chips, dings and signs of honest use as you would expect from a genuine vintage instrument of this age, but nothing that detracts from its outstanding overall presentation.

Factory Specifications

  • Fully hollow violin-shaped body
  • Spruce top
  • Flamed maple back and sides
  • Three-piece maple neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot position markers
  • 30" scale length
  • Twin Hofner staple pickups
  • Hofner control panel with individual pickup switching and volume controls
  • Original strip tuners
  • Original floating rosewood bridge
  • Original trapeze tailpiece
  • Sunburst finish

Weighing very little compared to most electric basses, the 500/1 offers a uniquely resonant acoustic character and effortless playing experience. Plugged in, it produces the warm, rounded and articulate sound that has become synonymous with countless classic recordings.

A wonderful opportunity to acquire a highly original mid-1960s Hofner Violin Bass in superb vintage condition.

Supplied with a quality non-vintage hard shell case.

item.title: B.C. Rich Chris Kael Warlock Bass Satin Black w. Custom Shop case both MINT — $1,365
item.description:
$1,365 · Excellent · Robert's Gear

Chris Kael Signature Warlock Bass + BC Rich Custom Shop Warlock Case in 100% MINT condition. Get one in NEW condition with the custom shop case for WAY less than the price of new. Both the bass and case are mint. Just installed new battery, and Schaller Strap Locks (will include the parts that go on the strap).  Purchased from a collector that was not a player. This bass was purchased and put away.  These run $1,499.00 new,(plus tax) and this one is in brand new condition. The Custom shop cases are running $299 to $319(plus tax). This thing sounds and plays amazing. Low, smooth action. ALL points/tips/potential wear spots are flawless. The electronics are very versatile on these.  A visually stunning bass, you WILL definitely stand out on stage. Specs are in the last two pix. Feel free to ask any questions, or for more pix. I pack well and ship VERY quickly, sometimes same day but always by next day(unless purchase is in a Saturday as I have no shippers open on Sunday in my area). Thanks for looking !

item.title: 【new】Mayones / JABBA HF Fretless 5 4.210kg #JAB2601589【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $7,680
item.description:
$7,680 · Brand New · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Mayones is a high-end brand that manufactures cutting-edge guitars and basses in Poland.

Its quality is well-established, as it is favored by top musicians such as Hadrien Feraud and Federico Malaman. (Titles omitted)

The Jabba is a model that takes the traditional Jazz Bass as its motif and develops it further.

This is the Hadrien Feraud signature model of the Jabba.

Born in Paris in 1984, Hadrien Feraud may still be considered a mid-career musician, but his presence is already legendary.

His solo album, released at the young age of 23, features musicians such as John McLaughlin and Biréli Lagrène. (Titles omitted)

He is truly a top player of the new generation.

This model comes in several specifications, but this is the fretless model.

The body top is spruce, and the body back is swamp ash.

The fingerboard is epoxy-coated Pau Ferro.

The body shape and joint design provide excellent access to the high frets, resulting in ultra-smooth playability.

It features a DELANO JMVC 5 FE/M2 pickup and an original Musashi Nitōryū preamp.

The controls are simple: master volume (push/pull - active/passive), balancer, treble, middle, and bass.

While offering a smooth playing feel, it delivers a robust, harmonically rich, and beautiful sound.

The preamp also functions as a headphone amplifier, allowing for direct headphone monitoring.

These modern features are another appealing aspect of the brand.

While 24-fret JB models can sometimes sound too tight, this model avoids that negative impression, producing a supple, harmonically rich, and beautiful sound.

A perfectly balanced, supreme fretless bass.

Body: Spruce Top/Swamp Ash Back
Neck: 1-pc / Hard Rock Maple 34.25
Fingerboard: Pau Ferro (Epoxy Coating)
Bridge: Mayones Big Foot Bridge (18 mm)
Pickup: J-J / Delano JMVC 5 FE/M2 Jazzbass Twincoil Humbucker
Preamp: Mayo Musashi Nitoryu
Controls: Volume (Pull/Pass), Balance, Middle, Treble, Bass

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: None

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Miura

Product Photos: Miura

Manufacturer's Warranty Included

◯About GIB and TONIQ Warranty

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation Required)

* Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

* This offer is only valid for the original purchaser at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

* Please note that shipping and other related expenses will be your responsibility.

● Buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damages caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* In case of malfunction or damage due to fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* In case of malfunction or damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* In case of malfunction or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty card is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When purchasing, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. Only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Ken Smith Burner HF5 E Series 2025 - Candy Red — $4,213.40
item.description:
$4,213.40 · Excellent · BassBros

Here we have another awesome Ken Smith Burner Hadrien Feraud! This is a great opportunity to get hold of one of these basses on the secondhand market which rarely come up! This one is one of the newer E series models, which feature a solid colour, satin neck finish, matching headstock, but still features the Ken Smith USA pickups and preamp. It is in excellent condition with very little signs of wear. There is some very slight tarnishing to the gold hardware on the body. Included is the original gigbag.

item.title: 【used】Sire / V7 Alder 4 BUR 4.540kg #2N24340269【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,054
item.description:
$1,054 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sire became famous for releasing basses supervised by Marcus Miller.


The quality of guitars and basses manufactured by this brand is extremely high, and it enjoys strong support not only from Marcus Miller fans but also from a wider audience.


This is the V7, modeled after the Jazz Bass.


The body is made of alder, the neck is maple, and the fingerboard is ebony.


Based on the rich midrange characteristic of an alder body, it features a clear attack and tight response from the ebony fingerboard, resulting in an easy-to-use yet modern sound.


The fingerboard and fret finish are excellent.


It boasts a high level of quality that is comparable to, and even higher-priced, instruments in this price range.


The pickups and preamp are original.


It features an active circuit that reflects Marcus Miller's style, allowing for a wide range of sound shaping.


It is characterized by a tight yet harmonically rich sound, a clear attack characteristic of an ebony fingerboard, and a powerful sound with a moderate amount of compression. This model is a must-try for anyone aiming for a Marcus Miller-esque sound, or simply for those looking for a high-quality Jazz Bass style.


Fret life is approximately 80%.


The truss rod is in good condition.


The neck is in good condition.


The body and paintwork are in generally clean condition with no noticeable scratches. There are some scratches on the pickup covers.


The electronics are in good condition.


No obvious modifications were observed.


Controls: Master Volume/Master Tone, Balancer, Treble, Middle/Middle Frequency, Bass, Active/Passive Switch, Preamp Gain (in cavity)

Nut Width: 38.1mm

Bridge String Spacing: 20mm

Scale Length: 34 Inch

Year of Manufacture: Unknown

Country of Manufacture: INDONESIA


During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings. Characterized by its straightforward sound and stable playability, these strings naturally bring out the instrument's inherent character.


These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.


Please enjoy these strings, aiming to be a new standard for bassists.


They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Gig bag


Text: Mizuki Ishikawa


Inspection 담당: Hirayama


Product photos: Tei


GIB 3-month warranty included


◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information


●Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""String Vibration Setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.



● Guaranteed Buyback Price


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


● Warranty Against Defects


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.


* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the wording has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)


● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in


When you purchase an item, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


We ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: 【used】Warwick / Rock Bass Streamer NT4 SHP BK 2021 3.950kg #F 562258-21【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $988
item.description:
$988 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Warwick is a globally renowned guitar and bass brand based in Germany.


In recent years, they have begun distributing other world-class brands such as Sadowsky.


They have increased their presence in many fields and release numerous attractive products.


Many top artists, including Stuart Zender, Jonas Hellborg, and Robert Trujillo, use Warwick basses (titles omitted).


They have made the excellence of their instruments known to the world.


While the company offers several models, this is the highly popular Streamer.


Its ergonomically designed body provides excellent playability.


This is the Streamer NT4 from the RockBass series, which incorporates the essence of Warwick in a more accessible form.


The body is made of alder, the neck is a 3-piece combination of maple and ekanga, and the fingerboard is wenge.


It is equipped with Active MEC P/J Pickups.


The preamp uses a MEC 2-band Active EQ.


This guitar features a smooth attack thanks to its neck-through construction and a distinctive, core sound characteristic of Warwick.


The alder body provides an easy-to-handle midrange, while the wenge fingerboard adds a tight, responsive feel, resulting in a tight, well-defined tone.


The P/J pickup configuration and 2-band EQ allow for a wide range of sounds, from thick and punchy to clean and practical.


While part of the RockBass series, this guitar offers the playability of a Streamer and the distinctive sound character of Warwick.


Fret life is approximately 90%.


The truss rod is in good condition.


The neck is in good condition.


The body and paintwork have some minor scratches, but overall it is in clean condition.


The electronics are in good condition.


No obvious modifications were observed.


Controls: Master Volume, Balancer, Bass, Treble

Nut Width: 40.0mm

Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm

Scale Length: 34 Inch

Year of Manufacture: 2021

Country of Manufacture: CHINA


During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.


These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.


These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.


Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.


Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.


Accessories: Soft case


Text: Mizune Ishikawa


Inspection 담당: Matsunaga

Product Photos: Tei


GIB 3-Month Warranty Included


◯GIB and TONIQ Warranty Information


●Lifetime Free Maintenance


Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free ""String Vibration Setup"" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)


・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.


・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.


・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.


●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee


If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.


●Defect Warranty


Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.


The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.


Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:


* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.


* Replacement of consumables.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.


* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.


* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.


* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.


* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.


(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)


● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in


When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)


Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.


We will ship with sufficient packaging.


We also ship internationally.



●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee

Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.


If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.


Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.

Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.
